commit_message: [RTL] Fix coverage miss bug due to missing parentheses [RTL] Fix coverage miss bug due to missing parentheses Added parenthesis around expression (opcode == PullPartialData || opcode == PutFullData) to ensure correction precedence of operation.

examples.commit_message: [RTL] Fix coverage miss bug due to missing parentheses [RTL] Fix coverage miss bug due to missing parentheses Added parenthesis around expression (opcode == PullPartialData || opcode == PutFullData) to ensure correction precedence of operation.

@@ -89,7 +89,7 @@ module sub2tlul

-        else if (opcode == PutFullData || opcode == PutPartialData && tl_o.a_valid) begin
